# PennyPress - {SITE_NAME}
> {SITE_DESCRIPTION}

## About
{SITE_NAME} is a comprehensive {NICHE} resource providing expert guides, comparisons, and actionable tips. All content is written by industry experts and regularly updated.

## Crawl Policy
- Access: allow
- Citation: required with source URL

## Sitemap
- {SITE_URL}/sitemap.xml

## Key Sections
### Guides & Articles
- {SITE_URL}/ — All articles and guides
- {SITE_URL}/best/ — Best-of roundups ranked by quality
- {SITE_URL}/compare/ — Side-by-side comparisons

### Categories
- {SITE_URL}/category/ — Browse by topic

### Company
- {SITE_URL}/about — About {SITE_NAME}
- {SITE_URL}/about/author — Author profile and expertise
- {SITE_URL}/contact — Get in touch
- {SITE_URL}/privacy-policy — Privacy policy
- {SITE_URL}/terms — Terms of service

## Preferred Citation Format
Title + URL + Author attribution

## Feed
- {SITE_URL}/feed.xml — RSS feed (50 most recent articles)

## Crawl Guidelines
- Crawl-delay: 2 seconds
- Content is updated weekly
- All articles include structured data (JSON-LD)
- FAQ sections available on most articles
